reviewerComments: Demand is well-documented and technically feasible. Recommend for approval.
currentState: The existing customer portal is outdated with poor UX and limited mobile support.
challengesGaps: No responsive design, slow load times, limited self-service capabilities.
businessRules: Must comply with DEWA branding guidelines and accessibility standards.
detailedRequirement: Full redesign of the customer-facing portal including mobile-responsive UI, account management, bill payment integration, and service request submission.
benefitStatement: Expected 40% reduction in call centre volume and 25% improvement in customer satisfaction scores.
commentsKeyPoints: Priority project aligned with DEWA 2025 digital strategy.

currentState: Running SAP ECC 6.0 Finance module which reaches end of support in 2027.
challengesGaps: Legacy system limitations, manual reconciliation processes, limited real-time reporting.
businessRules: Must maintain all existing financial reporting capabilities and add real-time analytics.
detailedRequirement: Upgrade from SAP ECC Finance to S/4HANA Finance including GL, AP, AR, and Fixed Assets modules with Fiori UI.
benefitStatement: 30% reduction in month-end close time and real-time financial visibility.
commentsKeyPoints: Critical upgrade to avoid support gap risk in 2027.

reviewerComments: Requirement details are insufficient. Please provide technical specification and full scope breakdown before resubmission.
currentState: Grid monitoring is done manually with limited automation and real-time visibility.
challengesGaps: No centralized monitoring dashboard, delayed fault detection, manual incident response.
businessRules: Must integrate with existing SCADA systems and comply with grid safety standards.
detailedRequirement: Build a real-time smart grid monitoring platform with IoT sensor integration, predictive fault detection, and automated incident response workflows.
benefitStatement: 50% reduction in unplanned outages through predictive monitoring.
commentsKeyPoints: Requires detailed technical architecture document before approval.

reviewerComments: Thoroughly reviewed. Strong business case and clear technical approach. Approved for escalation.
approverComments: Approved. Strategic priority. Proceed to demand shaping and project initiation.
currentState: Internal IT helpdesk relies entirely on manual ticket handling with long resolution times.
challengesGaps: High volume of repetitive tickets, long wait times, no 24/7 coverage.
businessRules: Must auto-escalate unresolved issues to human agents. Must be GDPR compliant.
detailedRequirement: Deploy AI-powered chatbot integrated with ServiceNow for Level 1 support, FAQs, password resets, and software requests.
benefitStatement: Automate 60% of Level 1 tickets, reducing helpdesk costs by AED 500K annually.
commentsKeyPoints: Pilot with 200 users before full organisation rollout.

reviewerComments: Approved for demand shaping. Strong ROI case and clear scope.
approverComments: Approved. Commence shaping phase with procurement team.
currentState: Vendor management is handled via spreadsheets and email, causing significant inefficiencies.
challengesGaps: No centralized vendor database, manual contract tracking, compliance audit gaps.
businessRules: Must integrate with SAP MM module and comply with DEWA procurement policy.
detailedRequirement: Implement a vendor management portal covering vendor onboarding, contract lifecycle management, performance tracking, and compliance monitoring.
benefitStatement: Centralized vendor data reduces compliance risk and improves procurement cycle time by 35%.
commentsKeyPoints: SAP MM integration is the critical path item. Engage SAP team early.

currentState: Current ESS portal has limited functionality and poor mobile experience.
challengesGaps: Employees must contact HR for routine requests. No mobile app available.
businessRules: Must integrate with SAP HCM and comply with DEWA HR policies.
detailedRequirement: Enhance ESS portal with leave management, payslip access, performance review self-service, and a dedicated mobile app.
benefitStatement: Reduce HR admin workload by 40% and improve employee satisfaction score by 15 points.
commentsKeyPoints: Budget allocation pending Q2 review. Submit once budget is confirmed.

currentState: Physical asset tracking relies on manual inspections and paper-based logs.
challengesGaps: No real-time asset visibility, high cost of manual audits, frequent asset misplacement.
businessRules: Must comply with ISO 55000 asset management standard and integrate with SAP PM.
detailedRequirement: Deploy IoT-enabled asset management system with real-time tracking, predictive maintenance alerts, and integration with SAP Plant Maintenance module.
benefitStatement: Reduce asset maintenance cost by 25% and eliminate manual audit overhead.
commentsKeyPoints: Coordinate with facilities and field operations teams during requirements phase.
